title: skopeo inspect: support for sha512 images
body:
(Rebased on #2746).

See individual commits.

Vendoring from a fork.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

podman inspect prior sha512 image built from scratch
```
$ ./bin/podman inspect localhost/test-sha512
[
     {
          "Id": "671c13d501533ad620d1ff829ef46c9c33a01b0d360d054f047dc5627b0c4296b02fd7350d103a653354d600ea743873c2e2fdd50382f42811c07f59fe7293ad",
          "Digest": "sha512:1919c905953e3d5c42eed8442451777f41390941f445bbefb3cbc5fbbea30f3258da357cdc8654548c4e024a893705614028eaf8fcc1d1f7588e16090619920c",
          "RepoTags": [
               "localhost/test-sha512:latest"
          ],
          "RepoDigests": [
               "localhost/test-sha512@sha512:1919c905953e3d5c42eed8442451777f41390941f445bbefb3cbc5fbbea30f3258da357cdc8654548c4e024a893705614028eaf8fcc1d1f7588e16090619920c"
          ],
......
......
$
```

Inspect image using skopeo from main
```
$ skopeo inspect containers-storage:localhost/test-sha512
FATA[0000] Download config.json digest sha256:cfceead3d1f96ba5866677ddd9f44b1583af938bdc08f1461809e82e56765d8b does not match expected sha512:671c13d501533ad620d1ff829ef46c9c33a01b0d360d054f047dc5627b0c4296b02fd7350d103a653354d600ea743873c2e2fdd50382f42811c07f59fe7293ad
$
```

Inspect image using skopeo built here
```
$ ./bin/skopeo inspect containers-storage:localhost/test-sha512
{
    "Name": "localhost/test-sha512",
    "Digest": "sha512:1919c905953e3d5c42eed8442451777f41390941f445bbefb3cbc5fbbea30f3258da357cdc8654548c4e024a893705614028eaf8fcc1d1f7588e16090619920c",
    "RepoTags": [],
    "Created": "2025-11-15T18:08:56.226408249Z",
    "DockerVersion": "",
    "Labels": {
        "io.buildah.version": "1.40.0-dev"
    },
    "Architecture": "amd64",
    "Os": "linux",
    "Layers": [],
    "LayersData": [],
    "Env": [
        "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
    ]
}
$
```

skopeo copy image to dir
```
$ ./bin/skopeo copy containers-storage:localhost/test-sha512 dir:/home/lsm5/test/sha512-copy
Getting image source signatures
Copying config 671c13d501 done   | 
Writing manifest to image destination
$
```

skopeo inspect copied-to dir
```
$ ./bin/skopeo inspect dir:/home/lsm5/test/sha512-copy
{
    "Digest": "sha512:1919c905953e3d5c42eed8442451777f41390941f445bbefb3cbc5fbbea30f3258da357cdc8654548c4e024a893705614028eaf8fcc1d1f7588e16090619920c",
    "RepoTags": [],
    "Created": "2025-11-15T18:08:56.226408249Z",
    "DockerVersion": "",
    "Labels": {
        "io.buildah.version": "1.40.0-dev"
    },
    "Architecture": "amd64",
    "Os": "linux",
    "Layers": [],
    "LayersData": [],
    "Env": [
        "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
    ]
}
$
```
@mtrmac PTAL. Main change here is https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2747/files#diff-6cac070631a328cbecde69cd12534e6b77254bcf5d366c4210afaa76e70bfe67 . Rest is vendoring.
@mtrmac PTAL. vendored `container-libs 01833ef7b7f1d306205be7fa6fb36d0d6a6e3a33` and also included a manpage update commit.
